name: tk-generator
description: Генератор технологических карт (ТК+МК) для изделий из натурального камня

scripts.test: node tests/excel-import.test.js && node tests/unit-normalizer.test.js && node tests/cost-calculator.test.js && node tests/overrides-loader.test.js && node tests/texture-validation.test.js && node tests/validation.test.js && node tests/config.test.js && node tests/smoke/generate-docx.test.js && node tests/smoke/generate-rkm.test.js && node tests/data-integrity.test.js && node tests/smoke/summary-report.test.js
scripts.smoke: node tests/smoke/generate-docx.test.js && node tests/smoke/generate-rkm.test.js && node tests/smoke/summary-report.test.js
